name: PetroGas Co
business: PetroGas Co is an oil and gas exploration company that holds working interests and royalty interests in oil and gas leases in Texas, Oklahoma, Utah, and Ohio. As of the filing, it has not generated any revenue. The company is actively seeking to acquire additional leases and commence drilling operations.

exposures.sentence: On June 10, 2015, we entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement with Zheng Xiangwu, a resident of Guang Dong Province, China, whereby we issued 40,000 million shares of its common stock in exchange for rights to certain oil and gas leases located in Frio and Atascosa Counties, Texas, consisting of a total of 714 total acres of land, two (2) working wells and a total of seven (7) wells (the Leases).
